name: Chocolate Vinegar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt together into a mixing bowl.
2. Make three wells in the dry ingredients. Pour vanilla extract into one well, vinegar into another, and melted butter into the third.
3. Pour water over all the ingredients. Beat with a wooden spoon until well blended.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 25 minutes or until cake tests done. Cool in pan on rack.
6. Frost with Mocha Chocolate Frosting. Cut into squares.
MOCHA CHOCOLATE FROSTING:
1. Combine confectioners' sugar, cocoa powder, softened butter, coffee, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
2. Beat, with an electric mixer set at medium speed, until smooth.
